---
name: Bug report
about: A reproducible defect in a @volo/* package or create-volo
title: "bug: "
labels: bug
---

<!-- A failing test is the best bug report. -->

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Affected package(s)

e.g. `@volo/queue@0.1.0`. Include the version.

## Reproduction

Minimal steps or, ideally, a failing test / a small repo:

```ts
// the smallest code that shows the bug
```

## Expected vs actual

- **Expected:**
- **Actual:** (include the full error — note the `code` on any `VoloError`)

## Environment

- Bun version:
- Node version:
- OS:
- Runtime tier: Node / Cloudflare Workers
